problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: Combining mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
